name: JeecgBoot
description: JeecgBoot is an AI-enabled low-code platform for building enterprise Java applications. It combines low-code code generation, no-code system assembly, AI-assisted workflow and form design, knowledge-base/chat features, process orchestration, and MCP plugin support to reduce repetitive development work while keeping generated systems customizable.

name: Nanobot

Active.

name: Khoj
description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.
